notes: Lead source; longevity protocol page listing rapamycin as a separate protocol section with 4+ years use; provided framing for off-label longevity context
Lancet Healthy Longevity 2024 systematic review of rapamycin analogues in humans; concludes clinical evidence insufficient to support routine off-label use; best summary of human evidence gap
Frontiers in Aging 2025: comprehensive review of rapamycin for longevity including ITP animal data, immune trials, safety profile, and ongoing human trials; covers pros and cons
2025 review: clinical evidence for off-label rapamycin in healthy adults; covers TRITON/PEARL immune data, safety concerns, dosing approaches, and evidence gaps
